MINI MINUTES:

RE:PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgement Pursuant To Ccp Sec 664.6.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enter judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
